title: Thaumic Ilumination
description: A modpack centered around Thaumcraft 6 and Thaumic Augmentation, with custom recipes, textures, and item names for mods like Chisel, Just Enough Calculation, and Chickenchunks.
body:
# Thaumic Illumination
![Thaumic Illumination Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9bacac07496c0a486387db735176e55305fc6df8_0.webp)
## Overview
This is a modpack focused around Thaumcraft 6 and Thaumic Augmentation.
Some decoration and quality of life mods have been added:
- Chisel
- Blockcraftery
- ChickenChunks
- NotEnoughCalculation
- Thaumic Inventory Scanning
- Thaumic JEI
## Check the Gallery page
Many aspects of some mods have been changed using CraftTweaker 2 and Resource Packs.
The recepie changes and custom names are shown on the Gallery page, go check it out!
Additionally the anvil tab of JEI has been removed so that recipes using catalysts declared after the anvil aren't annoying to view in JEI.
### Warning
If you add or remove any resource packs, you will need to reopen your current world for a large portion of the recipes to work.
# Off-Platform Mods
These are mods I used from Curseforge to make the modpack:

https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/thaumcraft

https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/baubles

https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/just-enough-resources-jer
